Noise Fill
filter.inkscape:menu-tooltip: Leaves on the ground in Fall, or living foliage
Paint objects with a transparent turbulence which wraps around color edges

tspan.tspan: this story has exposed a lot of aspects of myself that i've felt repulsed by, and for good reasons am i repulsed by them...
but it's also an important story for me to write, for we are all in this together, and we can only improve by constantly exposing ourselves.
to quote piece of music i've frequently referenced:
"I hope to present the darkest parts of myself and the human experience, and hopefully it provides a catharsis that makes us all feel a little less alone."
thank you for reading, if you somehow found this text.
as always, i'm always glad to hear what people have to say about my work, so if you're nerdy enough to find this, please feel free to reach out and yap.
